name: Frozen Banana Daiquiris
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
1. Combine all ingredients, except lime slices and cherries, in a large bowl.
2. Cover the mixture and freeze for 8 hours.
3. To serve, transfer the frozen mixture into an electric blender.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Garnish with lime slices and cherries.
6. Serve immediately.
